messages.content: This frontend is sensitive to large file-edit tool calls. Prefer one file per tool call, emit a short progress update before writing, and split large changes into follow-up calls.

toolGuidance.descriptionSuffix: This frontend accepts file updates most reliably when each tool call changes a single file. If multiple files are needed, create them through separate follow-up calls.

messages.content: Keep file creation and edit tool calls incremental so large work can be delivered in several smaller steps when needed.
